title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.500 - Ozark Mills Country designated
text:
227.500.  Ozark Mills Country designated. — The portion of Ozark County north of U.S. Highway 160, east of State Routes 5 and 95, south of the Ozark and Douglas County line, and west of the Ozark and Howell County line shall be designated as "Ozark Mills Country".
(L. 2002 S.B. 1199 § 1)
